hook: Self-deprecation works only when it does not quietly teach the room to lower your value.
body: A little self-aware humor can feel relaxed, but repeated self-minimizing can start to read like insecurity dressed as charm.

hook: Men often lean on self-deprecation because it feels safer than risking a more direct presence.
body: Let humor reveal ease, not self-erasure. A little self-aware humor can feel relaxed, but repeated self-minimizing can start to read like insecurity dressed as charm.

hook: Let humor reveal ease, not self-erasure.
body: Joking about a small real quirk can be warm. Repeatedly making yourself the least important person in the room usually is not.

body: Notice whether your humor leaves you feeling more expressed or more diminished afterward.
